description_long: This is a simple, square wooden stool with a flat top surface and four straight legs. The stool is constructed from medium-toned wood, featuring a visible grain pattern that adds a natural aesthetic. The legs are connected by horizontal support bars on all four sides, enhancing stability and structural integrity. The edges of the seat are slightly rounded, giving a softer appearance and reducing sharpness. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments, emphasizing a utilitarian and functional design. The stool is compact and sturdy, suitable for use in public or urban environments such as parks, bus stops, or community centers.
description: A sturdy, square wooden stool with a flat top, four straight legs, and horizontal support bars, finished in a medium wood tone with visible grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat square seat, two front legs, and horizontal support bars connecting the legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular profile of the seat, the side legs, and the connecting support bars.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same flat seat, rear legs, and support bars visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side profile and support structure.
